pr_text:
## Title: Fix invalid array access bounds in UE release cleanup

### Summary
The UE release cleanup logic in `release_UE_in_freeList()` contained insufficient bounds checking when cleaning up ULSCH and DLSCH entries for released UEs. The `find_ulsch()` and `find_dlsch()` helper functions could return indices that exceed the respective array limits (`NUMBER_OF_ULSCH_MAX` and `NUMBER_OF_DLSCH_MAX`), but the code only validated the lower bound (`id >= 0`) before dereferencing the arrays. This could
